description: Persistent user corrections for art classification. Injected into prompts and enforced in post-processing.

Tomb-Of-Mirrors.html.notes: Egyptian god/animal-like statues flanking the reels. Ships/Boats is wrong. User corrected in fresh batch v11.

san-fa-pandas.html.notes: Bamboo plants/trees visible in background. User corrected twice.

fortune-coin-fever-spins.html.notes: Dragon is decorative/symbol, not a character. Bamboo visible in background.

Tiger-7s.html.notes: Purple is from the game UI, not the art. Tiger is above the reels.

giga-match-moolah.html.notes: Theme is Luxury/VIP/Bank, not Steampunk. Magician character with crystal ball above reels.

88-Fortunes.html.notes: Animals and ship are symbols, not background elements.

Cash-Eruption.html.notes: Mountain/volcano is a reel symbol, not a background element.

Stinkin-Rich.html.notes: Slot machines visible in the casino background setting.

Way-Out-Wilds.html.notes: Has a purple frame around the reels.

san-fa-tigers.html.notes: Bamboo/tropical plants visible in background of Asian-themed game.

Gonzos-Quest.html.notes: User confirmed: no torches in this game

Cash-Eruption-Vegas.html.notes: Vegas outdoor backdrop with Statue of Liberty, Eiffel Tower landmarks. Post-process rule adds Urban/Modern City secondary. User corrected in fresh batch v11.

Super-25-Stars.html.notes: Classic slot in casino floor setting. Casino Interior visible. User corrected in fresh batch v11.

London-Tube.html.notes: London Underground train/station visible. User corrected in fresh batch v11.

Jimi-Hendrix.html.notes: Jimi Hendrix character visible. Claude missed. User corrected in fresh batch v11.

Aloha-Christmas.html.notes: Gifts/wrapped presents visible, not generic Christmas decorations. User corrected in fresh batch v11.

Armadillo-Does-Christmas.html.notes: Game has candles specifically, not torches. Compound label too vague. User corrected in fresh batch v11.

big-bounty-gold.html.notes: Visible coin stacks as treasure. User corrected in fresh batch v11.

jungle-jim-gold-blitz.html.notes: Temple/ruins statues visible in jungle setting. User corrected in fresh batch v11.

Captain-Glum-Pirate-Hunter.html.notes: Ship/boat is only a reel symbol, not a background element

Cleopatra-Gold.html.notes: Only stone carvings, hieroglyphs, stone arc - rest are symbols

Dino-Pays.html.notes: Dinosaur is in the logo only, not a real character outside reels

Cosmic-Cash.html.notes: Stars and planets are key visual elements

Fishin-Bonanza.html.notes: Frame is specifically a rope frame

Fortune-Temple.html.notes: Torches (separate from lanterns/candles) and stairs are key elements

10001-Nights.html.notes: Arabian theme uses hanging lanterns, not wall torches

Manic-Potions.html.notes: Potion laboratory uses candles, not torches

Royal-Masquerade.html.notes: Royal palace uses candles/candelabras, not torches

3-Clown-Monty.html.notes: Spooky/scary circus - primary Circus, secondary Haunted

Age-Of-The-Gods-Maze-Keeper.html.notes: Red is prominent, not just orange

Diamond-Safari.html.notes: Blue, brown earth, green - not red/gold

Cornelius.html.notes: User flagged: gems, farm house, barn missing
